examples.title: Word Count Streaming
examples.description: Basic streaming word count from TCP socket
examples.code:
from pyspark import SparkContext
from pyspark.streaming import StreamingContext

sc = SparkContext('local[2]', 'WordCount')
ssc = StreamingContext(sc, 5)
lines = ssc.socketTextStream('localhost', 9999)
counts = lines.flatMap(lambda line: line.split())\n              .map(lambda word: (word, 1))\n              .reduceByKey(lambda a,b: a+b)
counts.pprint()
ssc.start()
ssc.awaitTermination()
examples.explanation: Creates DStream from socket, processes in 5s batches, counts words
examples.spaceComplexity: O(k) - where k is unique words
